aiInsight: Leveraging SOT data, Liverpool's consistent 6.8 SOT/game against bottom-half teams makes their over 5.5 shots-on-target line today's top safe pick. Steer clear of the Arsenal vs. Brighton match, as both teams' SOT variance against similar strength opposition presents an unquantifiable risk. My confidence for today's overall card remains cautious-moderate, given the prevalent SOT volatility across several key fixtures.
